description_long: This house features a modern industrial design with a flat roof and exposed brick exterior. The front facade is characterized by large rectangular windows and a double-door entryway, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper level is visible, revealing an open-plan workspace with desks, computers, and shelving, suggesting a live-work or studio environment. The surrounding low wall encloses a small courtyard or front yard, with entry gates on two sides. The rear and side walls are mostly solid brick, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed brick house with large front windows, a double-door entry, and an enclosed courtyard. The interior features an open-plan workspace visible from above.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, double-door entry, and the open workspace inside.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the interior layout, including desks and equipment, with minimal exterior windows.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a solid brick wall with a row of upper windows and no visible entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the enclosed courtyard and partial interior, with few exterior features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large rectangular windows on the front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with no steps, flush with the courtyard, and large windows above; minimal decorative elements
